event_ai_summary: ABC Construction submitted a business license application for general contracting services. The application includes all required documentation and fees have been paid.
event_description: ABC Construction LLC submitted a new business license application for general contracting services in the city of Folsom.

event_ai_summary: Scheduled health inspection for Mario's Pizza restaurant. Inspection covers food safety, sanitation, and compliance with health department regulations.
event_description: Routine health department inspection scheduled for Mario's Pizza restaurant to ensure compliance with food safety regulations.

event_ai_summary: Building permit application denied for 123 Main Street due to zoning violations and insufficient parking requirements. Applicant may appeal the decision.
event_description: Building permit application for commercial development at 123 Main Street was denied due to zoning compliance issues and parking requirements.

event_ai_summary: Environmental compliance violation identified at industrial site. Company failed to properly dispose of hazardous materials and maintain required environmental controls.
event_description: Environmental protection agency identified violations at industrial facility including improper hazardous waste disposal and inadequate environmental controls.

event_ai_summary: Public hearing scheduled to discuss proposed zoning amendment for downtown district. The amendment would allow mixed-use development in previously commercial-only zones.
event_description: Public hearing to consider zoning amendment proposal for downtown district to allow mixed-use development including residential and commercial properties.

event_ai_summary: Federal community development block grant awarded to city for affordable housing initiatives. Grant amount is $2.5 million over three years.
event_description: City awarded federal Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) for affordable housing development and neighborhood revitalization projects.
source: Department of Housing and Urban Development

event_ai_summary: Tax dispute case filed in superior court by local business challenging property tax assessment. Business claims assessment is 40% higher than market value.
event_description: Local business filed lawsuit challenging property tax assessment, claiming the valuation is significantly higher than current market value.

event_ai_summary: Emergency response activated due to severe flooding in downtown area. Multiple agencies coordinated response including evacuation of affected residents and businesses.
event_description: Emergency response team activated due to severe flooding in downtown district. Coordinated response included evacuation, sandbagging, and emergency shelter operations.

event_ai_summary: Citizen service request submitted for pothole repair on Oak Street. Request includes photos and specific location details. Work order created and assigned to public works department.
event_description: Citizen reported multiple potholes on Oak Street between 1st and 3rd Avenue. Service request created and assigned to public works department for repair.

event_ai_summary: Noise complaint against local bar resolved through mediation. Bar owner agreed to install soundproofing and reduce operating hours during weekdays.
event_description: Resolved noise complaint against downtown bar through mediation process. Bar owner implemented soundproofing measures and adjusted operating hours.
